displayTitle: Tales of the Jedi: Redemption #2: The Search for Peace
synopsis:
At Exis Station, Sylvar addresses the convocation, denouncing Ulic Qel-Droma as the greatest shame of the Jedi for his alliance with Exar Kun and the deaths it caused, including that of her mate Crado. On Rhen Var, Ulic finds his lightsaber nothing but a lifeless tool and falls into a hole in the ground, where a vision of his late master Arca Jeth urges him to live, and he climbs back through the snow.

Hungry for a teacher, Vima Sunrider stows away on Hoggon's ship to find Ulic. Meanwhile Tott Doneeta brings Sylvar to Ryloth to confront the anger inside her; when she tries to rally his clan to revenge, Tott instead brokers peace between the feuding tribes, and Sylvar, unsettled, asks to be taken home to Cathar. Hoggon discovers Vima aboard his ship and drops her on Rhen Var with a transmitter, and she vows not to leave until she has become a Jedi.
title: Tales of the Jedi: Redemption #2: The Search for Peace
